# Appendix B – Partners and Detailed Methods  {-}
## Partners 
CWF and SFC collaborated closely to identify and prioritize structures for assessment during the field season. Planning team members contributed to the development of this plan by participating in scoping and planning meetings, completing field assessments, providing local knowledge, and reviewing documents and data. 

Table 20: Thompson-Shuswap WCRP planning team members.  

## Detailed Methods {-}
For details about accessibility, habitat, or connectivity models including structure-ranking methods, see detailed documentation for BCFishPass here: <https://smnorris.github.io/bcfishpass/index.html>.
